EmailTemplate.name: WebLeadAutoResponse
EmailTemplate.subject: Thank You for Your Interest — EXL Service
EmailTemplate.textOnly: Thank you {!Lead.FirstName} from {!Lead.Company} for reaching out to us. We have received your enquiry about {!Lead.Product_Interest__c} and will be in touch within 1 business day. Visit us at https://www.exlservice.com
EmailTemplate.description: Auto-response email sent to leads submitted via the Web-to-Lead form. References SCRUM-21.
